metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5470
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 2a: Biochemical fractions prepared from rat brain showed ACPT (ACP4) enriched in synaptosomes and synaptosomal membrane fractions.

Figure 2b,c: Immunocytochemical staining of div 15 hippocampal cultures showed ACPT co-localized with presynaptic marker synaptophysin (SYP), postsynaptic marker PSD95 (DLG4) and ErbB4 which is localized to both pre- and post-synapse (authors mention its postsynaptic localization but left out known presynaptic ErbB4, e.g. PMID:24803543 or PMID:20393464).

Figure 3: ACPT can be immunoprecipitated with ErbB4 in COS7 cells and brain homogenate.

Biochemical fractionations lack a PSD fraction and confocal imaging resolution is too low to discern pre/post-synaptic localization. Based on these data we cannot confirm localization to the presynapse, postsynapse, or both and so we annotate against more general "synapse" ontology term for now.

Based on the known transmembrane topology of this protein, "integral component of ... membrane" term was selected.. Experimental description: Results, Figure 2 legend: "Neuronal expression of ACPT. (A) Subcellular fractionation was performed on rat brains. "
